person.name: Robert de Muschamp
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
"The son of Thomas, was Robert de Muschamp II, who in 1191 had his father's lands restored to him. He died in 1208 and was succeeded by his son Robert de Muschamp III, who died in 1250 and was buried at Melrose. With his death, the male line came to an end once more, for he left three daughters. The eldest, Cicely had married Odinel de Ford, but as both were dead, their daughter Isabel was their heir. The second daughter, Margery had married Malise, earl of Strathearn, and the third daughter, Isabel had married William de Huntercombe, who was appointed guardian of his wife's niece, Isabel Ford".

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Muschamp於大約1155年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親Hugh de Muschamp32歲，母親Isabell26歲。他於1168年與Hawise de Chastillon在英國諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1208年在英國英格蘭享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾盧福德 艾比。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Muschamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from North and South Muskham (Notts), recorded in gallicized forms such as Muscamp and Muschamp from the 12th century onwards.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Muschamp was born about 1155, in Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Hugh de Muschamp, was 32 and his mother, Isabell, was 26. He married Hawise de Chastillon in 1168, in Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1208, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Rufford Abbey, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Muschamp est né environ 1155, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Muschamp, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Isabell, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Hawise de Chastillon en 1168, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1208, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Rufford Abbey, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Muschampが約1155年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Hugh de Muschampは32歳，母Isabellは26歳であった。1168年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでHawise de Chastillonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1208年にイギリスイギリスで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアルフォード アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Muschamp(이)가 대략 1155년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Muschamp(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabell(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1168년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 Hawise de Chastillon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1208년 영국 잉글랜드에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 루퍼드 애브브이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Muschamp родился около 1155 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Muschamp было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Isabell, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise de Chastillon в 1168 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1208 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности руффорд эбби, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
